title: Frontend Batch 30 - Admin Remaining Mutation Confirmation Failure Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced frontend-owned admin delete/confirm mutation failures so technical backend, storage, provider, stack, and status details are sanitized while visible rows, selections, dialogs, and retry affordances are preserved.
behaviorBugsFound: Admin Blog single and bulk delete failures could show raw SQL, status, stack, and backend details.
Admin Work single and bulk delete failures could show raw provider, storage, status, stack, and backend details.
Public inline Work delete failures could show raw SQL, status, stack, and backend details.

validation.command: npx skills find react admin mutation delete retry failure testing
validation.notes: Results were general mutation/admin React skills; no new skill was installed.
RED run failed with 5 raw technical delete failure assertions. Focused GREEN run passed with 2 files and 32 tests.

remainingGaps: Public inline Blog delete still has a similar toast catch path and should receive dedicated component coverage if a lightweight boundary is available.
Resume PDF remove failure sanitization is covered by upload-oriented paths, but broader non-upload admin remove mutations can be revisited if new admin modules are added.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 31 - Public Inline Blog Delete Failure Reinforcement.
